title: Thrillophilia Wins 'AI in Travel' at ET Entrepreneur Awards 2026
description: Mumbai (Maharashtra) [India], March 27: Thrillophilia, India's most trusted multi-day tour operator, has been awarded the 'AI in Travel' recognition at the Economic Times Entrepreneur Awards 2026, held in Mumbai. This award clearly highlights how well the company has been using artificial intelligence for its operations. This utilisation goes across the entire lifecycle of multi-day tours. It starts from when the itinerary gets created and checked for whether it's feasible for the on-ground coordination and final delivery. And all of this is seamlessly implemented in what most consider one of the highest operationally complex travel categories, that is, multi-day tours, an approach that recently helped Thrillophilia earn the AI in Travel recognition at the ET Entrepreneur Awards 2026.
content:
PNN

title: Austria plans to ban social media use for under-14s, joining a string of other countries
description: Austria’s governing coalition has announced plans to ban social media use for children under 14. It is joining a string of other countries in drawing up restrictions for young people. Officials said Friday that draft legislation will be drawn up by the end of June. It wasn’t immediately clear when the plan, which will need parliamentary approval, might take effect. The Austrian government plans to accompany the ban with an effort to beef up schools’ teaching of how to use media and deal with artificial intelligence.
content:
VIENNA (AP) — Austria's governing coalition on Friday announced plans to ban social media use for children under 14, joining a string of other countries in drawing up restrictions for young people.

title: WhatsApp rolls out dual account support for iPhone users, introduces Meta AI tools
description: NEW DELHI, Mar 27:  Meta-owned messaging platform WhatsApp on Friday announced a slew of new features, allowing Apple iPhone users to operate two accounts on a single device simultaneously, while also introducing new artificial intelligence (AI) tools for photo editing and drafting messages. The ‘two accounts, one phone’ feature, which was previously available only to Android users, is now rolling out on iOS. The company in a blog post said the update eliminates the need for users to carry two […]
